name: RankOracle
description: SEO Intelligence MCP Server — 13 tools for keyword research, SERP analysis, domain audits, competitor gaps, on-page optimization. First standalone SEO MCP. Credit-based pricing.

tools.name: keyword_research
tools.description: Research keyword volume, difficulty, CPC, trends

tools.name: check_ranking
tools.description: Check where a domain ranks for a keyword

tools.name: serp_snapshot
tools.description: Get top 10 Google results for a keyword

tools.name: domain_overview
tools.description: Domain SEO overview with position distribution

tools.name: content_score
tools.description: On-page SEO quality score with recommendations

tools.name: competitor_gap
tools.description: Find keywords competitor ranks for but you don't

tools.name: title_optimizer
tools.description: Title tag analysis and optimization suggestions

tools.name: meta_generator
tools.description: Meta title and description audit and generation

tools.name: rank_tracker
tools.description: Track positions for multiple keywords at once

tools.name: serp_alert
tools.description: SERP position change tracking over time

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Server health, pricing info, tool status
